args.query:
SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId, '#', '')) AS OwnerId_norm, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS sales_total
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
WHERE DATE(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN DATE('2022-06-25') AND DATE('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY OwnerId_norm
ORDER BY sales_total DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId, '#', '')) AS OwnerId_norm, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS sales_total
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
WHERE DATE(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN DATE('2022-06-25') AND DATE('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY OwnerId_norm
ORDER BY sales_total DESC
LIMIT 1;
